description: Export three JPEG images of the loaded DICOM file representing different states: an initial baseline view to ~/DICOM/exports/state_1_initial.jpg; a modified view with a 90-degree rotation, inverted grayscale mapping, and >300% zoom to ~/DICOM/exports/state_2_altered.jpg; and a restored baseline view after resetting all transformations to ~/DICOM/exports/state_3_restored.jpg.
